titles.title: I'm So Glad That the Lord Brought Me Out

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm so glad that the Lord brought me out, I'm so glad that the Lord brought me out.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If it had not been for Jesus, Tell me where would I be I'm so glad that the Lord brought me out.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: (I've been shouting since the Lord Brought me out…)
